response.global_summary: The video features two virtual characters performing two original songs, 'Step wa Oshizuka ni' and 'BAD HATTER', with dialogue skits in between and before the performances. The on-screen text identifies the songwriters and composers for both songs.

scenes.description: Dialogue scene between the two characters in front of a cabaret-style stage.
Performance of the song 'Step wa Oshizuka ni'. On-screen text: 作詞: Lily Mizusaki, 作曲: mARUTA mANABU.
Dialogue scene/skit in the dressing room.
Performance of the song 'BAD HATTER'. On-screen text: 作詞: 中路もどき, 作曲: DYES IWASAKI.
